DISCOVERY 302, PETITIONER LINDSAY CRIST'S AMENDED MOTION TO QUASH SUBPOENA OF DEFENDANT 2 REQUESTING PLTF'S INFORMATION FROM DEFENDANT 1, OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, FOR A PROTECTIVE ORDER REGARDING REQUEST FOR PAPER AND/OR ELECTRONIC RECORDS OR DATA IS CONTINUED 30 DAYS (JULY 10) TO ALLOW PETITIONER TO HAVE THE PETITION AND MOTION SERVED BY A PROFESSIONAL PROCESS SERVER, PER HER REQUEST IN DECLARATION OF LINDSAY CRIST REGARDING SERVICE. PETITIONER IS ORDERED (WITHIN 5 DAYS OF THIS ORDER) TO HAVE A PROFESSIONAL PROCESS SERVER HAND SERVE COPIES OF THE PETITION AND OTHER MOVING PAPERS ON BOTH AIRBNB AND THE DEPARTMENT OF FAIR EMPLOYMENT AND HOUSING AT THE ADDRESSES LISTED IN THE MARCH 22, 2019 EMAIL FROM AIRBNB ATTACHED TO HER MEMO OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES. PETITIONER SHALL FILE A NEW PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 10 DAYS OF THIS ORDER. COURT HAS SIGNED A CONTINUANCE ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM: PETER CATALANOTTI, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
Petitioner Lindsay Crist'S Amended Motion To Quash Subpoena Of Defendant 2 Requesting Pltf'S Information From Defendant 1, Or, In The Alternative, For A Protective Order Regarding Request For Paper And/Or Electronic Records Or Data
Off Calendar Jul-10-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Petitioner Lindsay Crist'S Amended Motion To Quash Subpoena Of Defendant 2 Requesting Plaintiff's Information From Defendant 1, Or, In The Alternative, For A Protective Order Regarding Request For Paper And/Or Electronic Records Or Data.

Off calendar per request of the moving party. Email dated 7/8/19.

Judge Pro Tem: Conor Moore, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Petitioner Lindsay Crist'S Amended Motion To Quash Subpoena Of Defendant 2 Requesting Pltf'S Information From Defendant 1, Or, In The Alternative, For A Protective Order Regarding Request For Paper And/Or Electronic Records Or Data
Off Calendar Jun-12-2019 Continued To Jul-10-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Petitioner Lindsay Crist'S Amended Motion To Quash Subpoena Of Defendant 2 Requesting Pltf'S Information From Defendant 1, Or, In The Alternative, For A Protective Order Regarding Request For Paper And/Or Electronic Records Or Data

The Petition to Quash Service is continued 30 days (July 10) to allow petitioner to have the Petition and motion served by a professional process server, per her request in Declaration of Lindsay Crist Regarding Service. Petitioner is ordered (within 5 days of this order) to have a professional process server hand serve copies of the petition and other moving papers on both AIRBNB and the Department of Fair Employment and Housing at the addresses listed in the March 22, 2019 email from AIRBNB attached to her memo of points and authorities. Petitioner shall file a new proof of service within 10 days of this order.

Court has signed a continuance order.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

AMENDED MOTION / Amended Notice Of Motion & Motion To Quash Subpoena Of Defendant 2 Requesting Pltf'S Information From Defendant 1, Or, In The Alternative, For A Protective Order Regarding Request For Paper And/Or Electronic Records Or Data
